user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on the back of my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Can you describe what changed? | Customer: There is a dent on the rear bumper that was not there before. | Support: Body damage only, or did anything break? | Customer: Just the rear bumper dent. Photo attached.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The rear bumper is clearly visible and the dent can be assessed from the submitted image.
claim_status_justification: The image shows a dent on the claimed rear bumper, consistent with the claim; history adds no risk.

user_claim: Customer: My laptop screen is cracked, it happened during shipping. | Support: Is the crack across the panel or just the glass coating? | Customer: A big crack right across the display. | Support: Does the screen still power on? | Customer: I attached a photo of it.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The laptop screen is fully visible and its condition can be assessed from the submitted image.
claim_status_justification: The claimed screen is clearly visible and intact with no crack, which contradicts the claim of a cracked display.

user_claim: Customer: My package arrived and I think items inside are missing. | Support: Can you show the opened package and contents? | Customer: I only have one photo of the closed box from far away. | Support: Could you photograph the inside? | Customer: This is the only photo I have right now.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted image shows only the closed box from a distance, so the contents cannot be inspected to evaluate the missing-items claim.
claim_status_justification: The image does not show the package contents, so the missing-items claim cannot be supported or contradicted from the available evidence.
